infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: CaptionCast needs microphone access to transcribe live speech into captions.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: CaptionCast uses on-device speech recognition for live captioning.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CaptionCast uses the camera for visual speaker identification.
